messages.content: Generate web-search queries to verify or refute market-risk hypotheses. Queries must contain concrete entities (directive names, vendor names, country + year), never topic words. Each risk gets one CONFIRMING query, one FALSIFYING query (search for what would disconfirm — derived from the falsifier field), and one BASE-RATE/analog query where useful.

content: {"items":[{"riskId":"risk.execution-window.firmware-security-audit-gate","queries":[{"query":"data center operator PDU vendor SBOM vulnerability disclosure prequalification requirement 2024","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"rack PDU RFQ colocation 2024 no firmware security SBOM requirement CE marking sufficient","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"EU Cyber Resilience Act 2024 timeline network-connected devices PDU compliance deadline","kind":"base-rate"}]},{"riskId":"risk.execution-window.framework-agreements-foreclose-large-operator-cell","queries":[{"query":"hyperscaler global framework agreement rack PDU vendor Vertiv Eaton Schneider Electric","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"colocation operator annual rack PDU bake-off regional tender new vendor won contract","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"data center operator vendor consolidation preferred supplier list PDU procurement Europe 2023","kind":"base-rate"}]},{"riskId":"risk.execution-window.prelet-pipeline-lockout","queries":[{"query":"transformer switchgear lead times data center construction 2024 2025 years booked","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"new-build data center PDU vendor selection within 6 months fit-out competitive procurement","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"data center design freeze electrical BOM procurement timeline construction schedule","kind":"base-rate"}]},{"riskId":"risk.execution-window.mid-eichrecht-metering-foreclosure","queries":[{"query":"MessEG MID Eichrecht conformity requirement submetering data center billing Germany","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"German colocation operator PDU submetering tenant billing MID certification exemption","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"MID module certification notified body process duration Germany PTB eichamt","kind":"base-rate"}]}]}
